targetArea: VCPChat renderer UI / Codex Router explicit entry

button.defaultState: disabled until renderer confirms host IPC availability

rendererBehavior.onBehavior: normal send wraps input as a task-envelope.v1 and calls codexRouterHostClient.run
rendererBehavior.forcedPrefixBehavior: /codex-router and /codex-task still force governed task execution
rendererBehavior.noSilentFallback: router mode or prefixed commands report unavailable host instead of falling back to normal chat

styleBehavior.dimensions: 32px icon button aligned with existing input actions
styleBehavior.enabledSignal: uses button accent background and icon stroke

notValidated: No automated Electron DOM click test was run in this turn.
User still needs to click the new button in the live VCPChat window and send a task to confirm visible UX.
remainingRisk: The toggle routes normal sends to Codex Router only while enabled; it does not make all VCPChat chat traffic mandatory-governed.
Current UI still reports task result by toast/window.__lastCodexRouterHostRun unless run-evidence persistence is implemented in a later step.
